arts.ttl: Notts County boss: Why Carlisle United will be 'real tough test'
arts.sum: Notts County boss Stuart Maynard has warned his promotion-chasing side that Carlisle United are good enough to climb the table.

arts.ttl: Notts County win race for Championship striker on loan
arts.sum: Notts County have won the race to sign Cardiff City striker Michael Reindorf on loan, as per Pete… The post Notts County win race for Championship striker on loan appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Carlisle United's Terell Thomas: 'I feel good, sharp - good to go'
arts.sum: INTERVIEW: The defender talks about his impressive return in the win at Fleetwood and Carlisle's hopes to build on it.

arts.ttl: Carlisle United boss salutes Scott ahead of Magpies mission
arts.sum: Mike Williamson hopes the goals will continue to flow for Cedwyn Scott at Carlisle United - as he prepares to face his former club tonight.

arts.ttl: Carlisle United’s Taylor Charters heads north of the border on loan
arts.sum: Carlisle United’s Taylor Charters has joined Queen of the South on loan until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: What did we learn from Carlisle United's win at Fleetwood?
arts.sum: ANALYSIS: Carlisle United secured a much-needed 2-1 win at Fleetwood Town on Saturday – so what did we learn from the game?

arts.ttl: Harris signs new deal with Carlisle United
arts.sum: Kadeem Harris has given Carlisle United's League Two survival hopes a major boost by signing a new deal.

arts.ttl: Carlisle United confirm loan deal for teenager Hopper
arts.sum: Teenage Carlisle United prospect Dan Hopper will spend the rest of the season with Penrith, it's been confirmed.

arts.ttl: Update on player who was stretchered off against Carlisle United
arts.sum: The Fleetwood Town striker stretchered off against Carlisle United has been ruled out with a long-term injury.

arts.ttl: In pictures: Carlisle United fans at the Fleetwood game!
arts.sum: Check out a bumper fans gallery as 1,087 travelling supporters cheered Carlisle United to a vital 2-1 win at Fleetwood Town.
